搭伙干活确实容易些，但那样你就得跟人平分战利品了。

options.title: Join Forces
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]50[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Solo Quest
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]150[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]18[/red]点生命。

pages.description:
Everyone's face immediately lights up, including [Is Multiplayer]!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold].
pages.description_zh:
每个人的脸上都乐开了花，包括[Is Multiplayer]！

这群人里居然还有个吟游诗人！
你们迈着轻快的步伐走入迷宫，[aqua]乌贼巫师阿奎德[/aqua]手到擒来地解除了所有陷阱，你和一位[red]格拉索里安战士[/red]则轻轻松松地解决掉了那些[orange]手持狼牙棒的守卫[/orange]。

这是你这辈子最愉快的一次冒险，你也真的留下了[gold][sine]美好的回忆[/sine][/gold]。

pages.description:
Feeling misanthropic, you [Is Multiplayer]wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even [jitter][purple]shakes their fist[/purple][/jitter] at you.

The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and [orange]feisty creatures with spiky clubs[/orange] fight you along the entire journey.

You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.
pages.description_zh:
你[Is Multiplayer]带着几分厌烦，无视了他们那此刻紧蹙的眉头，径直走了过去。其中一人甚至还[jitter][purple]对着你挥了挥拳头[/purple][/jitter]。

迷宫里到处都透着恶意。你掉进过地刺陷阱，被带刺的巨型滚木迎头击中，还得一路上和那些[orange]挥舞着狼牙棒的暴躁生物[/orange]缠斗。

你简直受够了这些带刺的玩意，甚至开始考虑下次冒险是不是得向团队协作低头了。

name: The Lost Wisp
description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.
description_zh:
远处有一幕古怪的景象。成堆的[sine][red]昆虫残骸[/red][/sine]层层堆叠，围绕着一个像是[orange]微小的光团[/orange]的东西。
它似乎对各种虫子都有着不俗的吸引力，但你却目睹了它迸发出火焰！

你走近前去一探究竟。

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain the [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold].
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]腐朽[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[gold]迷失鬼火[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: Your Max HP is too low.
options.description_zh: 你的最大生命值太低了。

options.title: Search the Nearby Area
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]60[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

pages.description:
You approach the [orange]Wisp[/orange] cautiously...
The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence.

When in arm's reach, you grasp the [orange]Wisp[/orange] but it [red][jitter]scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame![/jitter][/red]

Still, you [jitter]fumble and wrestle[/jitter] the creature into submission. Eventually, the [orange]Wisp[/orange] concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.
pages.description_zh:
你小心翼翼地靠近[orange]鬼火[/orange]…
你离得越近，它对你的反应就越强烈。

在伸手可及的地方，你紧握住了这团[orange]鬼火[/orange]，但它同时也[red][jitter]喷出一股炽热的蒸汽和火焰，将你灼伤！[/jitter][/red]

尽管如此，你还是在一番[jitter]手忙脚乱的缠斗[/jitter]中将其制服。最终，这团[orange]鬼火[/orange]选择了屈服，并认你为它的新主人。

pages.description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.
pages.description_zh:
远处有一幕古怪的景象。成堆的[sine][red]昆虫残骸[/red][/sine]层层堆叠，围绕着一个像是[orange]微小的光团[/orange]的东西。
它似乎对各种虫子都有着不俗的吸引力，但你却目睹了它迸发出火焰！

你走近前去一探究竟。

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain the [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold].
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]腐朽[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[gold]迷失鬼火[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: Your Max HP is too low.
options.description_zh: 你的最大生命值太低了。

options.title: Search the Nearby Area
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]60[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

pages.description:
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe!

Not much is in the area, but you find some [gold]gold[/gold] scattered amongst the dead bugs.
You don't seek an answer.
pages.description_zh:
你决定不去惊动那个小家伙。小心为上！

这附近没剩下多少东西，不过你在那些昆虫残骸中发现了一些散落的[gold]金币[/gold]。
你选择了就此收手。

name: Luminous Choir
description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.
description_zh:
你撞入了一片沐浴在诡异蓝光下的林间空地。高耸的蘑菇随着生物荧光起伏脉动，菌盖肿胀而泛着光泽。当你靠近时，真菌们竟开始发出[sine][purple]凄美而婉转的旋律[/purple][/sine]，这旋律在你的胸腔内激荡。

你注意到，在那个体型最大的蘑菇肉质中嵌入了某种闪光的东西，正随着真菌之歌有节奏地[sine]跃动[/sine]。

options.title: Offer Tribute
options.description_zh: 支付[red]149[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获取一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]149[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Spore Mind[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]移除[blue]2[/blue]张牌。将一张[red]孢子心灵[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

pages.description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.
pages.description_zh:
你撞入了一片沐浴在诡异蓝光下的林间空地。高耸的蘑菇随着生物荧光起伏脉动，菌盖肿胀而泛着光泽。当你靠近时，真菌们竟开始发出[sine][purple]凄美而婉转的旋律[/purple][/sine]，这旋律在你的胸腔内激荡。

你注意到，在那个体型最大的蘑菇肉质中嵌入了某种闪光的东西，正随着真菌之歌有节奏地[sine]跃动[/sine]。

options.title: Offer Tribute
options.description_zh: 支付[red]149[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。获取一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]149[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Spore Mind[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]移除[blue]2[/blue]张牌。将一张[red]孢子心灵[/red]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

pages.description: Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.
pages.description_zh: 将金币置于绵软的地面。随着金币缓缓沉入，几根卷须温柔地将一件遗物推向地表，让你得以干干净净地将其取走。

pages.description: You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind [sine]quivers[/sine] in response.
pages.description_zh: 你直接将手探入那株主导蘑菇的绵软组织中，掏出了其中的遗物。真菌网络因你的侵入而战栗，你的意识也随之一并[sine]震颤[/sine]。

name: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?
description_zh:
你进入了一片[green]结晶树[/green]的林谷，树木开始[jitter]激动地颤抖起来[/jitter]！
一阵阵杂乱的[sine]问候与欢迎声[/sine]在你耳边不断响起，原来是一群[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]从树上[jitter]绽放[/jitter]了出来。

有一只[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]在角落里坐立不安的样子，显然不像其他同类那样善于社交。

你是去找一群变形灵，还是去找落单的那个？

options.title: Group
options.description_zh: 失去[red]100[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

options.title: Loner
options.description_zh: 获得[green]5[/green]点最大生命。

pages.description:
You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]gold[/gold][red].[/red]
pages.description_zh:
你向那群叽叽喳喳的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]问好，它们伸出水晶手臂拥抱住了你。

它们将自己共有的知识分享给了你，更为你注入了[sine]拟形魔法[/sine]，改变了你的本质……这些[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]还真是群可爱的小生物啊。

[red]其中一个偷走了你的[/red][gold]金币[/gold][red]。[/red]

pages.description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?
pages.description_zh:
你进入了一片[green]结晶树[/green]的林谷，树木开始[jitter]激动地颤抖起来[/jitter]！
一阵阵杂乱的[sine]问候与欢迎声[/sine]在你耳边不断响起，原来是一群[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]从树上[jitter]绽放[/jitter]了出来。

有一只[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]在角落里坐立不安的样子，显然不像其他同类那样善于社交。

你是去找一群变形灵，还是去找落单的那个？

options.title: Group
options.description_zh: 失去[red]100[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[gold]变化[/gold][blue]2[/blue]张牌。

options.title: Loner
options.description_zh: 获得[green]5[/green]点最大生命。

pages.description:
You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.
pages.description_zh:
你向那只孤单的[aqua]变形灵[/aqua]伸出一只手，同情它内向的天性。
它送给了你一颗小小的水晶果实，你深知它们的传统，于是当场把果子吃了下去。

水晶果实让你的心智清明、使命感也更加坚定。你道了谢，再次向上方出发。

name: Neow
description:
[sine]I’ve... remade you....
...go... ..up.....[/sine]
description_zh:
[sine]我又... 重铸了你....
...上... ..去吧.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...hello... ..again.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]...awaken...
..Awaken.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]..receive.... this....
..blessing.. ...go......[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...kill.. the... [red][jitter]ARCHITECT[/jitter][/red][/sine]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[sine]...construct.. what...
....have you.. become...?[/sine]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[sine]...he.. can...
....fix.. you.. ...everything....[/sine]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[sine]...I.. can’t... ..make...
...you.. forget....[/sine]

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <resolute beeping sounds>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [sine]...good....[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..still.. lost.. to rage... good...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..so..furious...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]...so..useful...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [jitter]HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!![/jitter]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...my power..... is yours...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]He... still.. ....breathes...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Is... it.. ...even... possible...?[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[sine]... [red]Architect[/red].... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[sine]..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....[/sine]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...again..?[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [jitter]Why can’t I win?![/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...receive.. this... ..blessing...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [sine]..both...know..agony..of..family...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]..still...seeking..approval...?
...[jitter]FOOLISH[/jitter]...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...再次... ..问好.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]...醒来...
..醒来....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]..我把你... ..带回... ..来了...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...杀.. 死... [red][jitter]建筑师[/jitter][/red][/sine]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[sine]...构装体.. 你...
....变成.. 什么了...？[/sine]

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <坚决的嘀嘀声>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [sine]...很好....[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..起来吧.. 我的.. 战士...
..是时候... 继续...战斗了...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..依旧.. 深陷.. 狂怒么.. 很好...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..记起.. 你.. 第一..次
...来到 ..我面前...的时候..[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..那么..愤怒...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]...那么..有用...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [jitter]他杀死了我爱的一切！！[/jitter]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...我的力量..... 是你的了...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]他... 依旧.. ....生存...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [sine]那... 真的.. ...可能... 吗...？[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[sine]... [red]工程师[/red].... ..逐渐虚弱....
..我们.... 变强...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 巨大蓝色生物，我可是未来的[orange]王[/orange]！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...又一次..？[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [jitter]为什么我赢不了？！[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...收下.. 这份... ..赐福...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ……好的，谢谢你，涅奥。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...从.. 外面... 回来了么？
..我知道... 你会... 回来...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...你的..
 ...猎物.. 在等待...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [sine]..两个...都知道..家族..的..痛苦...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]..还在...寻找..认同...？
...[jitter]愚蠢[/jitter]...[/sine]

name: Nonupeipe
description:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.
description_zh:
我有几千年都没有接待过访客了！
哎呀，你的穿搭看起来有些乏味呢，来，我们给你挑些漂亮的穿吧。

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <embarrassed chirp>

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent steps out of the shadows...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 塔顶有疯狂在等待。穿上我的力量，消灭一切吧。

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
来到我这里，你走了很远吧！
过来吧，接受我的赐福。

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
构装体也能够配得上我的赐福么？
过来吧，故障机器人。在所有自动机械里，你将成为最美。

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 可怜的机器呀，如此残破不堪，来让我将你好好改善吧。

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 我通常不会喜欢建筑师的造物，但我承认，你让我有点喜欢上了。

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <羞赧的鸣叫>

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
啊，铁甲战士，终于来到了我的面前。
过来吧，我会赐予你我的力量。

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 铁甲战士，铁甲战士……是我之前的赠礼还不够么？

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
你又回来了么，我的勇士？这是多少次了？
过去的你，不是强大到可以消灭整个族群么？

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 你的护卫已经死了。传闻说，你会赐福给想要杀死建筑师的人。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
我喜欢有能力的人，所以我会把自己的力量分给你一部分。
下一次，可别再杀我的护卫了。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 法师若要战斗，自然需要上好的衣装和饰物。过来吧，亡灵契约师。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 建筑师见到你的[sine]宠物[/sine]，一定不会高兴的。

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 你是指奥斯提么？我会让他来完成最后一击的。

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 我要来见诺奴佩普！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
你从遥远的地方带来了这么华美的袍子么！
来，让你的仆从们把你带过来一点，我会给你赐福的。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
王室的访客，该有王室的赐福。
仆人们！为我们倒点茶来。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 建筑师发了疯！只有一位高贵的勇士能拯救我们于此危难了……

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
无需担心！我，储君，将会终止这场疯狂！
但是首先，喝茶！

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
一个小小的窃贼溜进了我的领域么？
别以为我看不见你啊？出来吧！

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: 静默猎手从阴影中走了出来……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
猎手啊，是什么让你回到了高塔？
过来吧，穿戴上这些赐福。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 我为你准备了礼物，刺客，不用害羞。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 在她的傀儡之中，属你最让我吃惊。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
是什么夺走了你的第一次生命？是涅奥[sine]找到[/sine]你的么？
真可惜啊，你不说话。

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
我有几千年都没有接待过访客了！
哎呀，你的穿搭看起来有些乏味呢，来，我们给你挑些漂亮的穿吧。

name: Orobas
description: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!
description_zh: 傀儡傀儡！！一路来到这里？！收下这些，拿去拿去！

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Try this!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Very good finds!! Look look!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Shiny orbs! How work?
[jitter]Ouch!![/jitter]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <quietly beeps>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Architect fix you?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: The Regent monologues for hours.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Stories?!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Infection...? [jitter]BLIGHT!?[/jitter] Take and go!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 试试这个！！！

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 找到了很好的东西！！你看，你看！

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
什么！构装体仆人？！居然还在运作！！
为什么在这里？？为什么不在工厂？？

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
闪亮的充能球！怎么运作的？
[jitter]啊呀！！[/jitter]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
核心损坏？涅奥驱使着坏了的构装体？
是利用？

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <安静的嘀嘀声>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 建筑师能修你？

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 一个铁甲战士！？怎么可能？？可怕，真可怕！！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 签下契约？为什么！？糟糕选择？对，大错误！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
祝愿你自己！！拼命祝愿！
瓦库坏，非常坏！建筑师能解放你？

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 死了？！没死！为何当傀儡？好大的手！！

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
我不是傀儡。有个人我必须要杀。
你能帮我点什么？

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 杀人不好！！带上这个吧！

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 不死者！有好礼物给你！！暴力不好。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 不要暴力！拿点亮闪闪的吧……亮闪闪！！

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
只有当建筑师不复存在，我的使命才会结束。
暴力不可避免。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 建筑师不坏！或许聊聊？聊聊很好！！非常好！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
旅行者！太空来的！？太空哪里？
怎么从太空来？脑袋尖尖！还有小小伙伴！！

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 储君独自说了几个小时。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 真有趣！真厉害！！再说说！再说说！！！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
更多故事！给你找了这些东西！
所以快来说更多故事！！

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
我的头号粉丝！欧洛巴斯，好朋友！
看到你还活着真是不错！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 故事？！

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 当然当然……不过你有给我找到更多饰品么？

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 感染……？[jitter]荒疫！？[/jitter]拿了东西就走吧！！

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 不传染？很快要死？建筑师能帮你？

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
姐妹们在哪里？吓人又很凶的姐妹们！
做个好人！别像姐妹们那样！！

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: 傀儡傀儡！！一路来到这里？！收下这些，拿去拿去！

name: Pael
description:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...
description_zh:
有傀儡来了？
能帮我去看看父亲的状况么？我太累了……

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Such malice paints your heart.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing [red]Father[/red] won’t bring peace.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: You call that [jitter]thing[/jitter] your father!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We do not choose our family...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why do you give yourself away?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 欢迎回来，朋友。让我的血肉帮助你吧……

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 佩尔正在沉睡，它的鼾声让整个房间不停震动着。

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
困扰的自动机械，在找你的朋友吗？
让我来帮忙……

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
构装体会做梦吗？
看着我，模仿我……

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
我梦见了你的朋友……
父亲可以将[aqua]缺陷[/aqua]复原……

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 你心中有着如此多的愤怒。学习我吧，找到一些平静……

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
你还记得做梦的感觉吗？
睡觉是件好事……

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
你必须平息你的火焰。
父亲可以让你获得自由……

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 有如此的恶意涂满了你的心。

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 如果你知道我的遭遇，你的心也会被涂成相同的颜色。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
你的道路上没有安宁。
拿走我的一部分吧，让它减轻你的重负……

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
带着手的人回来了。
痛苦的回忆。拿走我的力量然后离开吧……

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 杀死[red]父亲[/red]不会带来安宁。

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 你说那个[jitter]东西[/jitter]是你的父亲！？

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 我们无法选择自己的家人……

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
你好！我是储君。
你好？？[jitter]你好！？[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
安静点吧。
拿走我的一部分，然后上路吧……

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
我回来了！啊，你当然在睡觉。
让我看看这里……

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 你为什么要把自己的肉体送给别人？

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 既然我有大量的血肉时，为什么不送呢？

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
当你再次归来时，我也会焕然一新。
那就是睡眠的作用……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
杀戮的生物，这里不需要暴力。
拿走我的一部分，寻找安宁吧……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
猎取战利品？当然，拿走我的一部分吧……
只有你安心就好……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
你给我下了毒……？
那能有什么作用呢……？zZZzz……

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
有傀儡来了？
能帮我去看看父亲的状况么？我太累了……

name: Potion Courier
description:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
description_zh:
空气中传来一阵[sine]浓浓的酸味[/sine]，不一会儿你在附近找到了一个倒在地上的[gold]药水快递员[/gold]。
一动不动，已经没了气。[jitter]死了！？[/jitter]
快递员带着的物品已经被洗劫得差不多了，只有一批[green][sine]很难闻的药水[/sine][/green]好好地放在那里，上面有一张字条：“收件人：商人”。

options.title: Grab Potions
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]3[/blue]瓶[gold]污浊药水[/gold]。

options.title: Ransack
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机[gold]罕见药水[/gold]。

pages.description: What could the [blue]Merchant[/blue] want with these potions?
pages.description_zh: [blue]商人[/blue]要这些药水究竟是为了什么呢？

pages.description:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
pages.description_zh:
空气中传来一阵[sine]浓浓的酸味[/sine]，不一会儿你在附近找到了一个倒在地上的[gold]药水快递员[/gold]。
一动不动，已经没了气。[jitter]死了！？[/jitter]
快递员带着的物品已经被洗劫得差不多了，只有一批[green][sine]很难闻的药水[/sine][/green]好好地放在那里，上面有一张字条：“收件人：商人”。

options.title: Grab Potions
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]3[/blue]瓶[gold]污浊药水[/gold]。

options.title: Ransack
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]1[/blue]瓶随机[gold]罕见药水[/gold]。

pages.description: Only a single potion was intact.
pages.description_zh: 只有一瓶药水还完好无损。

name: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?
description_zh:
两个[gold]拳击构装体[/gold]正在挥拳互殴，而你看到在它们两个之间有一些财宝……

要不要把财宝顺走？

options.title: I Can Take Them
options.description_zh: 和它们战斗以得到[gold]更好的奖励[/gold]。

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]受伤[/red]加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

pages.description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?
pages.description_zh:
两个[gold]拳击构装体[/gold]正在挥拳互殴，而你看到在它们两个之间有一些财宝……

要不要把财宝顺走？

options.title: I Can Take Them
options.description_zh: 和它们战斗以得到[gold]更好的奖励[/gold]。

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].
options.description_zh: 将一张[red]受伤[/red]加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

pages.description:
The [gold]Constructs[/gold] turn to you menacingly!

You put your dukes up.
pages.description_zh:
两个[gold]构装体[/gold]恶狠狠地转向了你！

你举起了自己的拳头。

pages.description:
You successfully nab the relic!

...or so you thought. A right-hook [jitter][red]clocks you in the face[/red][/jitter].
pages.description_zh:
你成功地偷偷顺走了遗物！

……可惜美中不足，一记右勾拳[jitter][red]狠狠地打在了你的脸上[/red][/jitter]。

name: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.
description_zh:
一个[purple]你至今为止见过最年迈的人[/purple]走到了你的身前。
[sine]“我们又见面了....是我，兰伟德！”[/sine]

你不认识这个男人。

options.title: Give 100 Gold
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Give Potion
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Potions that can be given.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以给他的药水。

options.title: Give Relic
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Relics that can be given.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以给他的遗物。

pages.description:
[sine]“Mag.. nificent...”[/sine]

Ranwid mumbles while chewing the [gold]gold[/gold].
pages.description_zh:
[sine]“何等..美妙…”[/sine]

兰伟德一边嚼着[gold]金币[/gold]，一边咕哝着。

pages.description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.
pages.description_zh:
一个[purple]你至今为止见过最年迈的人[/purple]走到了你的身前。
[sine]“我们又见面了....是我，兰伟德！”[/sine]

你不认识这个男人。

options.title: Give 100 Gold
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Give Potion
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Potions that can be given.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以给他的药水。

options.title: Give Relic
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]2[/blue]件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Relics that can be given.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以给他的遗物。

pages.description:
“[sine]Exquisite...”[/sine]

[sine][blue]Glup glup glup[/blue][/sine]

He downs the [gold]Potion[/gold] in one go.
pages.description_zh:
“[sine]多么美味…”[/sine]

[sine][blue]咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟[/blue][/sine]

他一口气就喝下了[gold]Potion[/gold]。

pages.description:
[sine]“Exemplary...”[/sine]

Ranwid observes the relic studiously for several minutes...

Then eats the [gold]Relic[/gold].
pages.description_zh:
[sine]“真是经典…”[/sine]

兰伟德仔细地观察了这件遗物好几分钟……

然后把[gold]Relic[/gold]吃了下去。

name: Reflections snoitcelfeR
name_zh: 镜中倒影  影倒中镜
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]
description_zh:
这是什么？这里感觉不太对劲….
[sine]….劲对太不觉感里这？么什是这[/sine]

options.title: Shatter
options.description_zh: 复制你的整个[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[purple]霉运[/purple]。

options.title: Touch a Mirror
options.description_zh: [red]降级[/red][blue]2[/blue]张随机卡牌。[green]升级[/green][blue]4[/blue]张随机卡牌。

pages.description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]
pages.description_zh:
这是什么？这里感觉不太对劲….
[sine]….劲对太不觉感里这？么什是这[/sine]

options.title: Shatter
options.description_zh: 复制你的整个[gold]牌组[/gold]。获得[purple]霉运[/purple]。

options.title: Touch a Mirror
options.description_zh: [red]降级[/red][blue]2[/blue]张随机卡牌。[green]升级[/green][blue]4[/blue]张随机卡牌。

pages.description:
You concentrate and identify a giant seamless mirror in front of you.
With a swift kick you [jitter]SHATTER[/jitter] the giant mirror!
Right as you shatter the mirror your reflection braces [pronoun Object]self as [pronoun Subject] becomes a thousand beautiful glittering shards.

How can a place like this exist?
pages.description_zh:
你集中精神，终于辨识出前方有一面巨大且没有丝毫缝隙的镜子。
你飞出一脚，把巨大镜子[jitter]踢碎[/jitter]了！
就在踢碎镜子的那个瞬间，你看到镜中的自己摆出了防御的姿态，然后碎成了千万片美丽闪烁着的碎片。

这样的地方究竟是如何存在的？

pages.description:
You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you.
[sine]Which one am I?[/sine]
pages.description_zh:
你向前伸手，手却与前方倒映出来的影像融在了一起。
[sine]哪一个才是我？[/sine]

name: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].
description_zh:
你走过一个拐角，一个黑影突然矗立在前方。他转过身来，正对着你。

“欢迎！想做点什么买卖？”
他开口询问，同时猛地掀开斗篷，露出一大堆[sine][purple]可疑货物[/purple][/sine]。

options.title: Take the Bottom One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your Relics[/gold] for [gold]a random Relic[/gold].
options.description_zh: 用[gold]one of your Relics[/gold]换[gold]a random Relic[/gold]。

options.title: Take the Middle One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your Relics[/gold] for [gold]a random Relic[/gold].
options.description_zh: 用[gold]one of your Relics[/gold]换[gold]a random Relic[/gold]。

options.title: Take the Top One
options.description: Trade [gold]one of your Relics[/gold] for [gold]a random Relic[/gold].
options.description_zh: 用[gold]one of your Relics[/gold]换[gold]a random Relic[/gold]。

pages.description: “Hehehe Heh... Thank you!”
pages.description_zh: “嘿嘿嘿……多谢啦！”

name: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].
description_zh:
这房间里全是[b][jitter]芝士！！！[/jitter][/b]

你环顾四周，想看看有没有陷阱，结果发现头顶上是…更多的[b]芝士[/b]。屋里的蜡烛似乎也是用[b]芝士[/b]做的。家具同样是[b]芝士[/b]。
突然，你身后的门砰地一声关上了。

也是[b]芝士[/b]做的。

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 从[blue]8[/blue]张随机[gold]普通[/gold]牌中选择[blue]2[/blue]张加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

options.title: Search
options.description_zh: 失去[red]14[/red]点生命，获得[gold]天选芝士[/gold]。

pages.description:
You take a little nibble of [b]cheese[/b] but this fuels you to eat even more [b]cheese[/b].

[sine]Time passes...[/sine]

 You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of [b]cheese[/b].
Tonight, dreams will be [b]cheese[/b].
pages.description_zh:
你小尝了一小口[b]芝士[/b]，但这反而勾起了你对[b]芝士[/b]更强烈的食欲。

[sine]时光流逝…[/sine]

你最终吃下了惊人份量的[b]芝士[/b]。
今晚，大概梦里都全是[b]芝士[/b]了。

pages.description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

也是[b]芝士[/b]做的。

options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 从[blue]8[/blue]张随机[gold]普通[/gold]牌中选择[blue]2[/blue]张加入到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

options.title: Search
options.description_zh: 失去[red]14[/red]点生命，获得[gold]天选芝士[/gold]。

pages.description:
You scrounge about for [sine]hours and hours...[/sine]

Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this [b]cheese[/b], and you fade into a stupor....
You snap awake and realize you're holding something.

[b]The Chosen Cheese.[/b]
pages.description_zh:
你翻来覆去地找了[sine]几个小时……[/sine]

在这满屋[b]芝士[/b]的浓香包围下，你的意识开始飘向某些诡异的地方，时光悄然流逝，而你，渐渐陷入了昏沉…
你猛然惊醒，发现手中正攥着什么东西。

[b]那块天选芝士。[/b]

name: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]
description_zh:
你找到了一份送给[blue]“加拉洛特爵士”的[/blue][orange]请柬[/orange]，邀请他参加一次茶会，于是你决定代他前去。

走进其貌不扬的圆形大厅时，你发现这里有一大群[gold]指挥官[/gold]、[aqua]将军[/aqua]、[red]军阀[/red]和[blue]商人[/blue]们，正在……喝着茶？
一个头戴[gold]金冠[/gold]的巨人骑士开口说道：

[jitter]“汝来[b]茶会[/b]竟敢迟到？！”[/jitter]

options.title: Enjoy Your Tea
options.description_zh: 获得[red]王室猛毒[/red]。[green]回复全部生命。[/green]

options.title: Pick a Fight
options.description_zh: 失去[red]11[/red]点生命。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

pages.description:
The patrons stare wide-eyed at the corpse of one of their regulars... then [jitter]bursts into applause!?[/jitter]

“We were wondering how to rid of [red]Sir Wygore[/red], incredible work!”

They dump out your [green]poisoned tea[/green] and you discuss [orange]tactics[/orange] and [purple]secrets[/purple] all night. A most excellent tea party.
pages.description_zh:
众人震惊地望着一位常客的尸体……然后居然[jitter]响起了如雷的掌声！？[/jitter]

“我们早就头疼该怎么处理掉[red]外高尔爵士[/red]了，你干得好啊！”

他们倒掉了你的[green]毒茶[/green]，你们整晚讨论着[orange]战术[/orange]与[purple]秘密[/purple]。真是次开心的茶会啊。

pages.description:
You grab a teacup and down it one go.
It's [jitter][red]SCALDING HOT[/red][/jitter] but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation.

“We meant no offense, [blue]Sir Galalot[/blue]. our sincerest apologies.”

You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the [green]poison[/green] you've ingested.
pages.description_zh:
你抓起一个茶杯，一口喝了下去。
茶水[jitter][red]像开水一样滚烫[/red][/jitter]但你忍着没有改变表情，众人都被你如此不顾自身安危的行为给震惊了。

“之前的话，我们绝无意冒犯，[blue]加拉洛特爵士[/blue]。请接受我们最诚挚的道歉。”

你享用了一些茶水和烤面饼，完全没有注意到自己已经喝下了[green]毒药[/green]。

走进其貌不扬的圆形大厅时，你发现这里有一大群[gold]指挥官[/gold]、[aqua]将军[/aqua]、[red]军阀[/red]和[blue]商人[/blue]们，正在……喝着茶？
一个头戴[gold]金冠[/gold]的巨人骑士开口说道：

options.title: Enjoy Your Tea
options.description_zh: 获得[red]王室猛毒[/red]。[green]回复全部生命。[/green]

options.title: Pick a Fight
options.description_zh: 失去[red]11[/red]点生命。获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。

pages.description:
They all point their weapons at you-

“At least pay the [gold]entrance fee[/gold] if you want to live.”
pages.description_zh:
他们全都将武器指向了你——

“要是想活命，至少也得付下[gold]入场费[/gold]吧。”

pages.description:
You jump onto the table and [jitter]kick[/jitter] the [red]warlord knight[/red] in the face!
 The knight lets out a haunting shriek and keels over.

[jitter][purple]*everyone gasps*[/purple][/jitter]
pages.description_zh:
你跳到桌上，一脚[jitter]踹上[/jitter]了[red]军阀骑士[/red]的面门！
骑士令人毛骨悚然地惨叫了一声，就这么倒了下去。

[jitter][purple]*所有人都倒吸了一口凉气*[/purple][/jitter]

name: Sapphire Seed
description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?
description_zh:
你走路时差点踩上了一块发光的尖锐……种子？它的颜色非常明确地表明了这是一枚[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]！这些稀有种子不是应该已经灭绝了吗！？

传说里，只要吃下一粒这个种子，就能大幅[gold]强化你的体能[/gold]，但如果你把它种下然后好好养育它，又会怎么样呢？

options.title: Consume
options.description: Heal [green]9[/green] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 回复[green]9[/green]生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。

options.title: Plant and Nourish
options.description_zh: 给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]播种[/purple]。

pages.description:
You ingest the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] and within moments your [blue]limbs feel more agile[/blue], [gold]colors sharpen[/gold], and you [purple][sine]sense the souls of nearby foes[/sine][/purple].

Good thing you didn't step on it.
pages.description_zh:
你吃下了[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]，几乎一瞬间你就感觉到自己都[blue]四肢变得更加灵活[/blue]、[gold]眼中的色彩变得更加鲜艳[/gold]、而且你还能够[purple][sine]感知到附近敌人的灵魂[/sine][/purple]。

幸亏你没踩到它呢。

pages.description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

options.description: Heal [green]9[/green] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 回复[green]9[/green]生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你[gold]牌组[/gold]中的一张牌。

options.title: Plant and Nourish
options.description_zh: 给一张牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]播种[/purple]。

pages.description:
You scour the [green]Overgrowth[/green] and find a pot with [blue]good aeration[/blue]. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where [orange]light peeks through a cracked wall[/orange]. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to [green]camouflage[/green] it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the [aqua]seed[/aqua] just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

[sine]Grow big, little seed...[/sine]
Unknowingly, the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.
pages.description_zh:
你在[green]密林[/green]一番寻觅，总算找到了一个[blue]通风良好[/blue]的花盆。然后你四处跋涉，寻找一个无人侵扰的地点，能让[orange]阳光从墙上的裂缝中倾泻下来[/orange]。你小心翼翼地用树皮和藤蔓将花盆加固，为它提供一些[green]迷彩遮掩[/green]，然后往里面放入了一些肥沃高营养的土壤，接着把[aqua]种子[/aqua]埋了进去。

最后，你从附近的植物上采集到了一些露水，洒在了土上。

[sine]小种子，快长大…[/sine]
你甚至没有察觉，[aqua]蓝宝石种子[/aqua]已经依附到了你的精神上。
感谢你的辛勤努力。

name: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”

The book is [red]encrusted with blood[/red] so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?
description_zh:
地上有一本书：
《征服高塔的3种最佳方法》

这本书上[red]血迹斑斑[/red]，所以你觉得它非常可疑。

你要读它吗？

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以附魔的牌。

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.description_zh: 选择一张能力牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]迅速[/purple][blue]2[/blue]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Powers that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的能力牌。

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.description_zh: 选择一张技能牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]灵巧[/purple][blue]2[/blue]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Skills that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的技能牌。

options.title: Read the Back
options.description_zh: 选择一张攻击牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]锋利[/purple][blue]2[/blue]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Attacks that can be [gold]Enchanted[/gold].
options.description_zh: 你没有任何可以[gold]附魔[/gold]的攻击牌。

pages.description: You don't particularly care for books, let alone blood-encrusted ones.
pages.description_zh: 你本来就不怎么喜欢书籍，更何况是上面血迹斑斑的那种。

pages.description:
What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
“Avoid big monsters.”
“Take every card.”
“Blocking is for cowards.”

Your hands are covered in [red]blood[/red].
pages.description_zh:
真是本引人入胜的书啊！有几句良言至今深刻在你的脑海之中：
“避战大怪。”
“见牌就抓。”
“懦夫才防。”

你的手上沾满了[red]血[/red]。

pages.description:
You flip to a random page:
“Defense 101: Don't get hit!”

You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.
pages.description_zh:
你随便翻到一页：
“防御入门：别被打中！”

你读完了这一段，意外地相当给你启发。你决定在作战时用上其中的一些要点。

pages.description:
You flip the book over and read the summary:
[blue]“Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!”[/blue]

There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.
pages.description_zh:
你将书反过来，读了封底上的摘要：
[blue]“书评家和邪教徒们一致认同，尖尖的锋利武器是施加伤害的最佳途径！”[/blue]

封底还有一张售价标签，原价格被划掉了，改成了一个低得多的价格。

name: Slippery Bridge
description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden [blue][jitter]torrent of rain[/jitter][/blue]. [purple][sine]Massive gusts of wind[/sine][/purple] buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
description_zh: 当你穿过一座摇摇欲坠的木桥时，忽然间[blue][jitter]暴雨倾盆[/jitter][/blue]。[purple][sine]阵阵狂风[/sine][/purple]不断向你袭来，似乎要将你的旅程终结与此。

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3+[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3+[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

options.title: Overcome
options.description: [red]a random Card[/red] is removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: [red]a random Card[/red]将从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中被移除。

pages.description: [jitter]You're holding on![/jitter]
pages.description_zh: [jitter]你正在坚持！[/jitter]

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3+[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3+[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

pages.description: Still... Holding... [jitter]ooOOONN!!!![/jitter]
pages.description_zh: 还在…坚…[jitter]扌~~寺！！！[/jitter]

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3+[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3+[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

pages.description: [sine]AHHHH!?!!![/sine]
pages.description_zh: [sine]口~阝~可~！？！！！[/sine]

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3+[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3+[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

pages.description: [jitter][b]I CAN DO THIS!!![/b][/jitter]
pages.description_zh: [jitter][b]我能行！！！[/b][/jitter]

pages.description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden [blue][jitter]torrent of rain[/jitter][/blue]. [purple][sine]Massive gusts of wind[/sine][/purple] buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
pages.description_zh: 当你穿过一座摇摇欲坠的木桥时，忽然间[blue][jitter]暴雨倾盆[/jitter][/blue]。[purple][sine]阵阵狂风[/sine][/purple]不断向你袭来，似乎要将你的旅程终结与此。

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3+[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3+[/red]点生命。重新随机上方选项中的卡牌。

options.title: Overcome
options.description: [red]a random Card[/red] is removed from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: [red]a random Card[/red]将从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中被移除。

pages.description: I hate bridges.
pages.description_zh: 我恨桥。

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?
description_zh:
你偶遇了一个[aqua][sine]巨大的螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]。水流以精准而优雅的韵律回旋着，四周的墙壁也布满了螺旋纹路。

[purple][sine]转啊，转啊…转…
…转个不停…何等奇景…[/sine][/purple]

你要做什么呢？？

options.title: Drink
options.description_zh: 回复[green]0[/green]点生命。

options.title: Observe
options.description_zh: 为一张“[gold]打击[/gold]”或“[gold]防御[/gold]”[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]涡旋[/purple]。

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。 Add [red]Writhe[/red]到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

pages.description:
You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...
pages.description_zh:
你捧起双手，浸入[sine][aqua]螺旋漩涡[/aqua][/sine]。

泉水徐徐注满掌心，你闭上双眼，小口啜饮。

甘甜的水化作[sine]涡旋[/sine]流经全身，直抵你的[gold]核心[/gold]，涤荡了杂念与痛楚…

pages.description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

[purple][sine]转啊，转啊…转…
…转个不停…何等奇景…[/sine][/purple]

options.description_zh: 回复[green]0[/green]点生命。

options.title: Observe
options.description_zh: 为一张“[gold]打击[/gold]”或“[gold]防御[/gold]”[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]涡旋[/purple]。

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold]. Add [red]Writhe[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 获得一件随机[gold]遗物[/gold]。 Add [red]Writhe[/red]到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

pages.description:
[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]
pages.description_zh:
[sine][purple]…啊~ 如此美丽…
它在旋转…不停地旋转。是啊……
噢！刚才那是…一点小水花吗…？
…这也正常。你也要寻点乐子，对吧，[aqua]涡旋先生[/aqua]…哈哈…
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

是时候离开了。
你低声呢喃，转身离去。

[gold]“谢谢你，涡旋。”[/gold]

pages.description:
Foolishly, you plunge your arm into the center of the [aqua][sine]Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua], disrupting the equilibrium. The water becomes [blue][jitter]frigid[/jitter][/blue] and grasps you, carving [jitter][red]Invisible Spirals[/red][/jitter] into your arm.

Your fingers brush against something solid, and you grasp around in pain to finally wrestle a [gold]Relic[/gold] out of there!
pages.description_zh:
你愚蠢地将手臂探入[aqua][sine]螺旋漩涡[/sine][/aqua]的中心，打破了这里的平衡。
泉水瞬间变得[blue][jitter]冰冷刺骨[/jitter][/blue]并将你死死攫住，在你手臂上凿刻出[jitter][red]无形涡旋[/red][/jitter]。
指尖触碰到了某种硬物，你在剧痛中一阵摸索，总算从中拽出了一件[gold]遗物[/gold]！

name: Spirit Grafter
description:
Above, a cocoon is [jitter]shaking and wriggling[/jitter], about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. [orange][sine]The cocoon ignites[/sine][/orange]! [jitter]What is going on?[/jitter]
In a flash of [gold]light[/gold] and [red]flame[/red], a [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.
description_zh:
在你上方，一个茧正在[jitter]颤动扭曲[/jitter]，似乎就要破茧而出了！

……它停止了扭动。[orange][sine]茧燃烧了起来[/sine][/orange]！[jitter]发生什么事了？[/jitter]
一道[gold]光芒[/gold]与[red]烈焰[/red]闪过，一个[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]向你冲来，试图要与你融为一体，以求完整。

options.title: Let It In
options.description_zh: 回复[green]25[/green]点生命。将一张[gold]羽化[/gold]添加到你的[gold]牌组[/gold]。

options.title: Rejection
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 失去[red]9[/red]点生命。从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除一张牌。

options.title: Rejection
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Remove a card from your [gold]Deck[/gold].
options.description_zh: 失去[red]9[/red]点生命。从你的[gold]牌组[/gold]中移除一张牌。

pages.description:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly [green]heals[/green] you up.

You are [blue]reborn[/blue].
pages.description_zh:
[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]与你合二为一。这只契合灵体带来的活力迅速[green]治愈[/green]了你。

你[blue]重获新生[/blue]。

pages.description:
The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a [purple][sine]poof[/sine][/purple].

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]
pages.description_zh:
[orange]灵魂嫁接者[/orange]被你的意志轻松挡下。

然而渴求着宿主的它仍然反复向你冲撞过来。最终它用尽了力量，[purple][sine]噗的一声[/sine][/purple]消散了。

[sine]真是转瞬即逝的灵魂啊。[/sine]

name: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.
description_zh:
在一个废弃庭院的当中，有一块巨大的石头。

石头边的一块牌子上写着：
[gold][b]永恒之石[/b][/gold]。

从它的样子、形状和装饰来看，整个庭院都是围绕着这块[blue]石头[/blue]建造出来的，它从来没有离开过那个地点哪怕一次。

options.title: Drink and Lift
options.description: Lose [red]a random Potion[/red]. Gain [blue]10[/blue] Max HP.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]a random Potion[/red]。获得[blue]10[/blue]最大生命。

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要药水。

options.title: Push
options.description_zh: 失去[red]6[/red]点生命。[gold]附魔[/gold]一张攻击牌：[purple]活力[/purple][blue]8[/blue]。

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要一张攻击牌。

options.description_zh: 需要一张攻击牌。

pages.description:
You slam the [gold]a random Potion[/gold] down and [jitter]lift with all your might[/jitter]!!

Nothing happens.
pages.description_zh:
你一口闷了[gold]a random Potion[/gold]，然后[jitter]用全身的力气试图抬起那块石头[/jitter]！！

什么也没发生。

pages.description:
You [jitter]push and push[/jitter] with everything you've got!!

Nothing happens.
pages.description_zh:
你用尽全身的力气[jitter]努力地推了又推[/jitter]！！

什么也没发生。

name: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...
description_zh:
你看见一尊古老的雕像，一半沉没在池塘的水中。雕像的手放在一把[blue]石剑[/blue]之上。

同时你还看见，池塘的水底似乎有一些东西在[gold][sine]闪烁[/sine][/gold]着光芒。
或许是人们祈愿投下的金币？

钱可是个好东西……

options.title: Dive into the Water
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]111[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。失去[red]7[/red]点生命.

options.title: Grab the Sword
options.description_zh: 获得[gold]石之剑[/gold]。

pages.description:
You plunge deep into the water!

While collecting the [gold]offerings[/gold] you hear a [sine][blue]dull echo[/blue][/sine] and you're struck by stones!

Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; [red]physical[/red] and [purple]spiritual[/purple].
pages.description_zh:
你一个猛子扎进了水中！

在搜集[gold]祈愿金币[/gold]的时候，你听到上方传来[sine][blue]沉闷的回声[/blue][/sine]，然后你被一些石头给砸到了！

当你浮出水面时，才看见那尊古老的雕像已经因为你的所作所为而崩坏了——看来你不只是在[red]物理[/red]上、也是在[purple]灵性[/purple]上侵扰了这里。

pages.description:
You [jitter]wrest[/jitter] the [blue]sword[/blue] out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart!

It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was [gold][jitter]glittering[/jitter][/gold] at the bottom of the pond now...

Inspecting the [blue]sword[/blue], you sense an incredible [green]dormant power[/green] within.
pages.description_zh:
你[jitter]用力[/jitter]从雕像的手中取下了[blue]石剑[/blue]，结果雕像整个崩坏了！

现在再潜水去找池底的那些[gold][jitter]闪亮的东西[/jitter][/gold]就有点太危险了……

你看了看[blue]剑[/blue]，感受到其中有着极为强大的[green]沉睡着的力量[/green]。

pages.description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

name: Sunken Treasury
description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!
description_zh:
一条小路让你找到了一个部分淹水的金库。
你看到里面有[blue]2[/blue]个[gold]箱子[/gold]，但却只有[blue]1[/blue]把[jitter][purple]脆弱的钥匙[/purple][/jitter]。

[gold]第一个箱子：[/gold]你摇晃了一下，能听到叮铃哐啷的轻响，应该是少量金币。
[gold]第二个箱子：[/gold]巨大、精致、而且显然[red]被诅咒了[/red]。里面有很多金币！

options.title: First Chest
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]60[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Second Chest
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]333[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。得到[red]贪婪[/red]。

pages.description: Yup, there was [gold]gold[/gold] in it.
pages.description_zh: 没错，里面果然有[gold]金币[/gold]。

pages.description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are [blue]2[/blue] [gold]chests[/gold] but only [blue]1[/blue] [jitter][purple]brittle key[/purple][/jitter].

[gold]The First Chest:[/gold] Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!

options.description_zh: 获得[blue]60[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Second Chest
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]333[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。得到[red]贪婪[/red]。

pages.description:
You've never seen so much [gold]gold[/gold] in one place!

[sine]All of the [/sine][blue]Merchant's[/blue][sine] wares can be bought...[/sine]
[Monologue]
[sine]Dangerous thugs can be paid off...[/sine]

The [red][sine]feverishly greedy[/sine][/red] thoughts stay with you forever...
pages.description_zh:
你从没有在同一个地方见到过这么多[gold]金币[/gold]！

[sine]恐怕[/sine][blue]商人[/blue][sine]的所有商品都能被买下来…[/sine]
[Monologue]
[sine]危险的歹徒也可以用钱收买消灾…[/sine]

这些[red][sine]无比贪婪[/sine][/red]的念头，会永远萦绕在你脑中……

name: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]
description_zh:
在你的旅程中，你遇到了一个黑色无定形的肉块状生物，你能感觉到它非常古老、并且非常邪恶。

[sine]过来吧…[/sine]

options.title: Approach
options.description_zh: 将一张攻击牌[gold]附魔[/gold]：[purple]腐化[/purple]。

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.
options.description_zh: 你没有可以附魔的攻击牌。

options.title: Kill with Fire
options.description_zh: 选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。

pages.description:
It suddenly jumps onto you. You feel a searing pain as it latches onto your arm, but in an instant it is gone.

...? Where did it go?
pages.description_zh:
它突然跳到了你的手臂上，这一瞬间，你感觉到灼烧般的疼痛，但很快它就消失不见了。

……？它到哪里去了？

pages.description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

[sine]Approach...[/sine]
pages.description_zh:
在你的旅程中，你遇到了一个黑色无定形的肉块状生物，你能感觉到它非常古老、并且非常邪恶。

[sine]过来吧…[/sine]

options.title: Kill with Fire
options.description_zh: 选择一张牌[gold]变化[/gold]。

pages.description:
You torch the dark polyp. As it screeches and burns into ashes, your head pulses painfully but you manage not to faint.
What was that thing?
pages.description_zh:
你将那黑色生物点燃，它发出尖锐的鸣叫、很快烧成了灰烬。你的脑袋砰砰作响、疼痛难忍，但你最终坚持着没有晕过去。
那究竟是什么东西？

name: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.
description_zh:
你打败了两只[blue]同族守护者[/blue]，进入了它们守护的藏宝库。

里面有一块[purple][sine]刻着熟悉铭文的石板[/sine][/purple]。你的直觉告诉你，上面的语言可以轻易解读……可是一旦开始解读，你就必须全神贯注。

石板上散发出一种令人安心的能量，你也可以就这样砸碎它，来获取其中的[green]治愈能量[/green]。

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

options.title: Smash
options.description_zh: 回复[green]20[/green]点生命。

options.title: Give Up
options.description: Stop reading the text and leave.
options.description_zh: 停止阅读文字，就这样离开。

pages.description:
As you begin deciphering the tablet, the [blue]Kin's Mantra[/blue] speaks to you.

“The [gold]Truth[/gold] is everything...”
pages.description_zh:
当你开始解读石板时，你的脑海中响起了[blue]同族真言[/blue]。

“[gold]真理[/gold]即是一切……”

options.title: Continue Deciphering
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

pages.description:
You feel faint from all this reading!

[purple][sine]Heroes weren't meant to read for such an extended period of time...[/sine][/purple]
pages.description_zh:
你一直读到现在，感觉有点头晕目眩！

[purple][sine]英雄可不该一直读书读这么久…[/sine][/purple]

options.title: Keep Deciphering
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

pages.description:
[sine][red]You're barely holding on...[/red][/sine]
The tablet is nearly deciphered. The [blue]Mantra[/blue] holds the truth... 

[jitter]THE TRUTH!! WHAT IS THE TRUTH!?[/jitter]
pages.description_zh:
[sine][red]你只能勉强坚持住阅读…[/red][/sine]
石板已经快要被解读完毕了。[blue]真言[/blue]之中，自有真理……

[jitter]真理！！真理究竟是什么！？[/jitter]

options.title: KEEP DECIPHERING
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.title_zh: 继 续 解 读
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

pages.description:
In a trance, you decipher the remaining text, abandoning mind and body. [purple][sine]The spiritual pursuit of the [gold]Truth[/gold] is all that matters.[/sine][/purple]

Or does it? One final word remains...
[jitter]It will cost everything.[/jitter]
pages.description_zh:
恍惚之中，你解读完剩余的文本，也抛却了自己的心智与肉体。[purple][sine]对[gold]真理[/gold]之道的追求是唯一重要的事情。[/sine][/purple]

真的是这样吗？还剩下最后一个词……
[jitter]读懂它的代价，将是一切。[/jitter]

options.title: Lose Everything
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL of your cards.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。[gold]升级[/gold]你的所有卡牌。

pages.description:
[red][jitter]Everything was spent[/jitter][/red] to decipher the [gold]Final Word[/gold] and you black out...
When you come to, you realize something is etched into the floor.

[b]“Air”[/b]
pages.description_zh:
[red][jitter]你将自己的一切耗尽[/jitter][/red]，试图解读出[gold]最后的词语[/gold]，然后你失去了意识……
当你苏醒过来时，你发现地板上刻了一个词。

[b]“空气”[/b]

pages.description: You stop all this reading and deciphering. Your body normalizes, though you can't help but wonder what the [gold]Truth[/gold] was.
pages.description_zh: 你停止阅读和解读，你的身体恢复了正常，但你依旧无比好奇：[gold]真理[/gold]究竟是什么。

pages.description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.
pages.description_zh:
你打败了两只[blue]同族守护者[/blue]，进入了它们守护的藏宝库。

里面有一块[purple][sine]刻着熟悉铭文的石板[/sine][/purple]。你的直觉告诉你，上面的语言可以轻易解读……可是一旦开始解读，你就必须全神贯注。

石板上散发出一种令人安心的能量，你也可以就这样砸碎它，来获取其中的[green]治愈能量[/green]。

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.
options.description_zh: 失去[red]3[/red]点最大生命。随机[gold]升级[/gold]一张牌。

options.title: Smash
options.description_zh: 回复[green]20[/green]点生命。

pages.description:
The tablet is [jitter][red]smashed to pieces[/red][/jitter], energy expelled from the tablet seeps into your body.

[green]You feel refreshed![/green]
pages.description_zh:
石板被[jitter][red]砸成了碎片[/red][/jitter]，其中的能量渗入了你的身体。

[green]你觉得自己焕然一新！[/green]

name: Tanx
description:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!
description_zh:
[b]太弱小了！但是你很有潜力！[/b]
[b]用这把武器！！[/b]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: CONSTRUCT! NO WEAPONS!? HAVE THIS!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: ORBS ARE NOT WEAPONS!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: FIGHT ME, DEFECT!!

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: The Defect valiantly fights.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: ORBS [jitter]ARE[/jitter] WEAPONS!?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad fights Tanx.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Yes, it’s special-made for vengeance.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, OSTY!!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: All know that orange is the most regal color!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME, REGENT!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: No! We fought last time I was here!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME AGAIN!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: FIGHT ME, SILENT!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHERE DID YOU GO!!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [b]快点变强，让我们好好战斗一番！！！[/b]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [b]武器永远不嫌多！！[/b]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [b]构装体！没有武器么！？收下这个！[/b]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [b]几个球球，算什么武器！[/b]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [b]故障机器人，与我一战！！[/b]

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: 故障机器人英勇地战斗了。

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: [b]球球[jitter]真是[/jitter]武器！？[/b]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [b]好厉害的剑，战士！你该用上更多武器！[/b]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [b]战士该有武器！拿上一把！我们来战斗吧！[/b]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [b]铁甲战士，与我一战！！[/b]

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: 铁甲战士与坦克斯战斗了。

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [b]好哇！！豪迈的一战，收下武器！[/b]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [b]多么强大的巨镰！[/b]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 是的，它是为复仇而特别打造的。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [b]那只手，是否需要武器！？[/b]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [b]奥斯提，与我一战！！[/b]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [b]亡灵契约师，与我一战！！[/b]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 亡灵契约师与奥斯提和坦克斯战作一团。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [b]了不起的团队合作！！收下一把武器吧！[/b]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [b]橙色！？这个存在为何会是橙色！？？[/b]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 众所周知，橙色是最符合帝王的颜色！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [b]了不起！真是强大！！[/b]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [b]橙色的！！选一把强大的武器吧！[/b]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [b]储君，与我一战！！[/b]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 不要！上次我来这里我们已经战斗过了！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [b]再来与我战斗啊！[/b]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [b]一个猎手！我会把你细小的利爪磨得更利！！[/b]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [b]为何用匕首！！它不强大！[/b]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [b]静默猎手，与我一战！！[/b]

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: 静默猎手逃离了战斗，沿途偷走了一把武器。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [b]你去了哪里！！[/b]

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
[b]太弱小了！但是你很有潜力！[/b]
[b]用这把武器！！[/b]

name: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].
description_zh:
你不知怎么晃进了一个灯光昏暗的小棚屋，发现里面的空间感觉非常和平，四周摆满了种类繁多的茶叶。

屋子里面的男人做出手势，让你去看一批[green]茶叶[/green]，每一种都有雅致的标签告知你茶叶的[gold]高昂价格[/gold]。

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description_zh: 支付[red]50[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[Bone Tea Description]

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]50[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description_zh: 支付[red]150[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[Ember Tea Description]

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]150[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

pages.description:
The [blue]tea master[/blue] acknowledges your request and begins.

[gold]1.[/gold] Water from a charcoal-filled carafe is ladled into a kettle.
[gold]2.[/gold] The kettle is heated using a gentle [purple]violet flame[/purple].
[gold]3.[/gold] A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
[gold]4.[/gold] Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
[gold]5.[/gold] The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup.

[green][sine]“Tea is served.”[/sine][/green]
pages.description_zh:
[blue]茶艺大师[/blue]认可了你的请求，开始了他的行动。

[gold]1.[/gold] 用勺子将一个装满木炭的玻璃瓶中的水舀到一个水壶里。
[gold]2.[/gold] 水壶用[purple]紫罗兰色的文火[/purple]慢慢熬煮。
[gold]3.[/gold] 在水开之前，往壶中放入一勺茶叶。
[gold]4.[/gold] 将壶从火源上拿下，用有节奏的敲击来计算时间。
[gold]5.[/gold] 将水壶高高举起，精准地将茶叶倒入下方极小的茶杯中。

[green][sine]“请用茶。”[/sine][/green]

pages.description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].
pages.description_zh:
你不知怎么晃进了一个灯光昏暗的小棚屋，发现里面的空间感觉非常和平，四周摆满了种类繁多的茶叶。

屋子里面的男人做出手势，让你去看一批[green]茶叶[/green]，每一种都有雅致的标签告知你茶叶的[gold]高昂价格[/gold]。

options.title: Bone Tea
options.description_zh: 支付[red]50[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[Bone Tea Description]

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]50[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: Ember Tea
options.description_zh: 支付[red]150[/red][gold]金币[/gold]。[Ember Tea Description]

options.title: Locked
options.description_zh: 需要[blue]150[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

pages.description:
You politely decline the tea and—

[jitter][red]*SLAM*[/red][/jitter]

The door behind you slams shut. The [blue]tea master[/blue] stares at you for a moment, then presents an ugly cup.
Oh, this tea is for the discourteous...
pages.description_zh:
你礼貌地拒绝了点茶，然后——

[jitter][red]*砰咚*[/red][/jitter]

你身后的门狠狠地关上了。[blue]茶艺大师[/blue]盯着你看了一会儿，然后拿出了一个很丑的杯子。
啊，这是专门给无礼之人准备的茶……

name: Tezcatara
description:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?
description_zh:
哎呀，有客人！快进来吧，亲爱的！
特兹卡塔拉能为你做点什么吶？

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] away your flaws.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <greetings beep>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Not here to annoy me? What an [jitter][b]unusual[/b][/jitter] little construct...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <inquisitive beep>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Well, if you’re really [jitter][b]certain[/b][/jitter].

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] so pretty! Come in, come in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t [jitter][b]slaughter[/b][/jitter] on an empty stomach!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him [jitter][b]quickly[/b][/jitter] would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [jitter][b]Wonderful[/b][/jitter]!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn [jitter][b]brighter[/b][/jitter].

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: What do you know?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know who wrote that [jitter][b]book[/b][/jitter].

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Oh my, what an [jitter][b]exotic[/b][/jitter] visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Where are my manners?
Tezcatara cackles with delight.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made [jitter][b]treats[/b][/jitter] for you!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing [jitter][b]great[/b][/jitter] out there.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: We all need to learn from our mistakes.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: You can [jitter][b]trust[/b][/jitter] me.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Such a nasty [jitter][b]sickness[/b][/jitter] you have. Let’s take care of you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Oh dear... you haven’t been [jitter][b]fighting[/b][/jitter] have you?

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 欢迎回来，小可爱。让我来[jitter][b]烧掉[/b][/jitter]你的缺点。

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 进来吧，亲爱的！特兹卡特拉今天能为你做些什么呢？

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <问候的嘀嘀声>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 不是来这里烦扰我的吗？真是个[jitter][b]不同寻常[/b][/jitter]的小小构装体呢……

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 要是他被自己的同类给毁了，那该多荒唐呀？

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 你确定想要被修好么？

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <好奇的嘀嘀声>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: 哎呀，要是你真的[jitter][b]确定[/b][/jitter]的话。

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: 啊呀，你[jitter][b]燃烧[/b][/jitter]得真漂亮！进来，进来吧！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
你是个多么强壮的男孩啊！来，吃点东西吧。
空着肚子可没法[jitter][b]杀戮[/b][/jitter]！

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
哦哦，建筑师还活着吗？那能不能麻烦你[jitter][b]快点[/b][/jitter]去杀了他呢？
我就在这里等着吧！

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 嗯，一具骷髅来到这个地方是要做什么呢？

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
我的目标很单纯，我要为我的家人们复仇。
我会前往塔顶，让他付出代价。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [jitter][b]真是太棒了[/b][/jitter]！

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 进来吧，进来！我们来让你的火焰燃烧得更[jitter][b]明亮[/b][/jitter]。

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 你周身的这些火焰，倒是让我想起了一样禁忌的东西。

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: 你知道些什么？

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: 我认得写[jitter][b]那本书[/b][/jitter]的家伙。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 啊呀呀，真是位[sine]稀奇[/sine]的访客！你是哪位呀，亲爱的？

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 我不是什么亲爱的！对我说话得尊重一点，巨大的……东西人类！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
那我真是礼数不周啦？
特兹卡塔拉高兴地咯咯笑。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
你和你的伙伴们又回来啦？
我给你们做了好些[jitter][b]点心[/b][/jitter]哦！

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 欢迎回来，王室男孩！看起来你在外头表现得[jitter][b]很棒[/b][/jitter]呢。

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: 那当然了！只是在上层遇到了一些小小挫折……比如死掉。

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: 所有人都是从错误中吸取经验的吶。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 过来一点，安静的小家伙。我的眼神可不太好使啦……

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 你可以[jitter][b]信任[/b][/jitter]我的。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 你得了很严重的[jitter][b]疾病[/b][/jitter]呢。让我来照顾你吧。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 我也见过你的姐妹们，你知道吧？都是很可爱的女孩子呢。

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: 哎呀亲爱的……你不会一直在都[jitter][b]战斗[/b][/jitter]吧？

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
哎呀，有客人！快进来吧，亲爱的！
特兹卡塔拉能为你做点什么吶？

name: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?
description_zh:
转过拐角，你感受到一阵轻微的轰鸣，随后发现了一台巨大的旋转装置！
它带有几个槽位，似乎能将液体转化为高度压缩的易消化药片。

将这些药水炼成一小片的想法令人有些不适，但或许尝试新事物也不错？

options.title: Insert [Rarity] Potion
options.description_zh: 失去[gold]a Potion[/gold]。获得一张[gold]升级过[/gold]的[gold][Rarity][Type]牌[/gold]。

pages.description: The tablet was disgusting. There is no hope for the future.
pages.description_zh: 这药片真恶心。这未来简直毫无希望。

name: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.
description_zh:
你发现了一把发出微光的钥匙，于是将它捡了起来。

“我找这把钥匙可把这里翻了个遍！你要是不介意的话……”

这家伙看起来不是什么好人，但或许你也不该以貌取人。

options.title: Keep the Key
options.description_zh: 战斗来取得钥匙。

options.title: Return the Key
options.description_zh: 获得[blue]100[/blue][gold]金币[/gold]。

options.title: RETURN_THE_KEY
options.description: The stranger thanks you for your help, and rewards you handsomely.
options.description_zh: 陌生人感谢了你的帮助，给了你许多奖赏。

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.
